javascript-typescript-support.details: Implements JS/TS cognitive complexity via tree-sitter-javascript@0.21.4 and tree-sitter-typescript@0.21.2. 14 unit tests, all passing. CI now triggered after ci.yml sync push.

merged_prs.158: fix: remove incorrect % symbol from complexity score
merged_prs.166: ci: add concurrency control and path filtering

notes: PR #164 (JS/TS support) updated with ci.yml sync to trigger CI. PR #161 (release 0.2.1) still open for maintainer. Issue #163 (ci-coach) closed after PR #166 merged. tree-sitter has major update 0.21->0.25 pending investigation. Next run: check if PR #164 CI passes, check if release PR #161 needs attention.
